title: agent_started.data.tools[] surfaces every agent-built-in tool with avp.tool.dispatch_target=local
description: SPEC.md §9: with the refs-only Commission, agent_started.data.tools[] is the agent-internal contribution to the unified tool bag — built-in tools the agent ships compiled into its package. Each entry MUST include `name` and SHOULD set `avp.dispatch_target` to `local`. MCP-server tools land separately on `mcp_server_connected.data.avp.mcp.tools[]` after resolution. There is no Commission.exposed filter in v0.1 — every built-in surfaces directly.

agent_builtin_tools.name: read_file
agent_builtin_tools.description: Read a file from the workspace.

events.label: agent_started lists both built-ins with dispatch_target=local

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a file from the workspace.
